message:
fix: Use exact match for PyObject list element type check

The empty list type check was using indexOf() which matched ANY occurrence of
'*runtime.PyObject' in the type string. This incorrectly converted tuples/structs
containing PyObject elements to string lists.

Changed to use exact equality check (eql) so only lists with element type
exactly '*runtime.PyObject' (truly unknown elements) get converted to string.

Also fixed duplicate arrayLessThan function in runtime.zig by removing the
local definition and using the one from container_ops.zig.
